Build Free AI Agents with Ollama & Claude Code (New Loop Command)

Learn how to run Claude Code completely free on your local machine using Ollama and open-source models without any API keys or subscriptions. This guide covers the brand-new loop command for scheduling recurring tasks like research and bug triaging to build a 24/7 autonomous AI team.

08:32 - 30-Day Automation Plan
